prompt_text:
### Demographics: 70-year-old Asian woman

### Visit type: Follow-up visit (12-month follow-up)

### Reason for visit / current symptoms
Reason for visit: Routine follow-up (every 3 months) | Diagnosis context: 21 years ago Diagnosed with type 2 diabetes during urgent care evaluation for fatigue/blurred vision
Current symptoms: Reports 1-2 mild hypoglycemia episodes per month (self-resolved); no DKA/HHS signs; Despite repeated counseling on insulin need, the patient strongly refuses injections; shared decision was made to intensify oral therapy and reassess within 2-4 weeks.

### History
- Other conditions: Chronic kidney disease Stage 2 (60-89)
ASCVD: History of myocardial infarction
Simple Steatosis
Body mass index category: Obese Class II
Diabetic retinopathy
Diabetic Retinopathy
Osteoporosis (on bisphosphonate therapy)
Chronic Obstructive Pulmonary Disease
Recurrent Complicated Urinary Tract Infections
- Diabetes-related comorbidities: CKD: Stage 2 (60-89); HF (No); ASCVD: History of myocardial infarction; MASLD: Simple Steatosis; BMI Category: Obese Class II
- Family history: Type 2 diabetes (maternal grandmother)
- Social history: Former smoker (quit 1 years ago; 15 cigarettes/day for 10 years; ~7.5 pack-years); Alcohol 1-2 drinks/week

### Medication information
- Current medications: Metformin 1000mg twice daily; Glimepiride 2mg once daily; Dulaglutide 1.5mg once weekly; Fluticasone/salmeterol Inhaler (twice daily), Rosuvastatin (10 mg daily), Lisinopril (10 mg daily), Nitrofurantoin (100 mg twice daily for prophylaxis), Alendronate (70 mg weekly), Calcium Carbonate 500 Mg + Cholecalciferol 1000 Iu (daily)

### Physical exam (current)
Weight 76.9 kg; Height 158.8 cm; BMI 30.5 kg/m²; Blood pressure 143/84 mmHg

### Laboratory values (with date / relative timing)
Format: YYYY-MM-DD value or relative timing (12 months ago / 9 months ago / 6 months ago / 3 months ago / current)
Order: 12 months ago -> 9 months ago -> 6 months ago -> 3 months ago -> current
- Glycemia: HbA1c (12 months ago 11.2%; 9 months ago 11.0%; 6 months ago 11.0%; 3 months ago 10.5%; current 10.7%), FPG (12 months ago 311mg/dL; 9 months ago 242mg/dL; 6 months ago 315mg/dL; 3 months ago 303mg/dL; current 300mg/dL)
- Anthropometrics / blood pressure: Weight (12 months ago 79.2kg; 9 months ago 79.1kg; 6 months ago 75.3kg; 3 months ago 76.8kg; current 76.9kg), Height (12 months ago 158.8cm; 9 months ago 158.8cm; 6 months ago 158.8cm; 3 months ago 158.8cm; current 158.8cm), BMI (12 months ago 31.0kg/m²; 9 months ago 31.0kg/m²; 6 months ago 30.0kg/m²; 3 months ago 30.0kg/m²; current 30.5kg/m²), SBP (12 months ago 146mmHg; 9 months ago 143mmHg; 6 months ago 146mmHg; 3 months ago 144mmHg; current 143mmHg), DBP (12 months ago 85mmHg; 9 months ago 82mmHg; 6 months ago 83mmHg; 3 months ago 85mmHg; current 84mmHg)
- Liver function: ALT (12 months ago 54U/L; 9 months ago 54U/L; 6 months ago 61U/L; 3 months ago 55U/L; current 56U/L), AST (12 months ago 45U/L; 9 months ago 36U/L; 6 months ago 38U/L; 3 months ago 36U/L; current 40U/L), Total Bilirubin (12 months ago 1.2mg/dL; 9 months ago 1.2mg/dL; 6 months ago 1.2mg/dL; 3 months ago 1.2mg/dL; current 1.2mg/dL)
- Kidney: eGFR (12 months ago 76mL/min/1.73m²; 9 months ago 76mL/min/1.73m²; 6 months ago 72mL/min/1.73m²; 3 months ago 76mL/min/1.73m²; current 73mL/min/1.73m²), UACR (12 months ago 5.0mg/g; 9 months ago 4.9mg/g; 6 months ago 6.7mg/g; 3 months ago 6.8mg/g; current 6mg/g)
- Lipids: LDL (12 months ago 82mg/dL; 9 months ago 81mg/dL; 6 months ago 76mg/dL; 3 months ago 82mg/dL; current 78mg/dL); HDL (12 months ago 55mg/dL; 9 months ago 59mg/dL; 6 months ago 56mg/dL; 3 months ago 58mg/dL; current 57mg/dL); Triglycerides (12 months ago 187mg/dL; 9 months ago 169mg/dL; 6 months ago 190mg/dL; 3 months ago 188mg/dL; current 179mg/dL)
- Hemoglobin: Hemoglobin (12 months ago 15.0g/dL; 9 months ago 15.0g/dL; 6 months ago 14.2g/dL; 3 months ago 14.0g/dL; current 14.3g/dL)
- Additional tests: urine ketone Negative (Current); fasting C-peptide 1.73 ng/mL (Current)

### Individualized treatment decision factors
Current adherence and self-management: Very poor adherence (estimated <50%); SMBG rarely performed; lifestyle control severely limited. Strong injection refusal is documented; under shared decision-making, the patient accepts oral regimen adjustment with short-interval reassessment.
Financial context: Patient has comprehensive insurance with minimal out-of-pocket burden and reports no financial barriers to clinically indicated therapies (budget ≤ KRW 1,000,000/month).
